REST endpoints (Text Platform v3.6 Agent Chat API) for agents to manage chats, send messages, transfer conversations, and update statuses. All actions are POST requests under /agent/action/{action} and authenticated with OAuth 2.x bearer tokens or Personal Access Tokens.

Contact Support:
 Name: LiveChat / Text Platform
